use_cases: Landing page hero sections for creative SaaS products
Interactive portfolio showcases with color customization
Product launch pages with animated visual elements
ai_summary: An animated hero section with an interactive hue slider for real-time color customization. Features Framer Motion animations including smooth transitions and morphing effects. The component uses a dark theme with gradient elements and 3D-like visual depth, making it suitable for creative and media-focused SaaS landing pages.
